column1: In 1990, there were fewer than 300 Siberian tigers in the world.
In Russia, a person has the right to hunt a Siberian tiger.
A lot of Siberian tigers were killed in a battle near Vladivostok.
The Siberian Tiger Project was only concerned with stopping illegal hunting.
Both Russia and China tell citizens about the problems Siberian tigers experience.
Siberian tigers could live with other tigers if they had enough space.
More Siberian tigers live in zoos than anywhere else.
